case_title: PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC VS. BRYAN KRINGEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KRINGEN, BRYAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRINGEN, BRYAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1888 GENEVA AVENUE 	13, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KRINGEN, BRYAN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC SERVED AUG-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KRINGEN, BRYAN

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-21-2025.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEI ASSET POOL V, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRINGEN, BRYAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE. $16,272.50 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $550.00 COSTS, $6,769.18 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,016.68, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
